'''chasusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecina|cecina]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecina|cecina]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chasusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæsisith|chæsisith]] || [[word:chæsisij|chæsisij]] || [[word:chæsisish|chæsisish]] || [[word:chæsisi|chæsisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chasususuth|chasususuth]] || [[word:chasususuj|chasususuj]] || [[word:chasususush|chasususush]] || [[word:chasususu|chasususu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chasusuth|chasusuth]] || [[word:chasusuj|chasusuj]] || [[word:chasusush|chasusush]] || [[word:chasusu|chasusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chasufsuth|chasufsuth]] || [[word:chasufsuj|chasufsuj]] || [[word:chasufsush|chasufsush]] || [[word:chasufsuf|chasufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chasusuthu|chasusuthu]] || [[word:chasusuju|chasusuju]] || [[word:chasusushu|chasusushu]] || [[word:chasusuku|chasusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chasusuth|chasusuth]] || [[word:chasusuj|chasusuj]] || [[word:chasusush|chasusush]] || [[word:chasusu|chasusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chasusuthul|chasusuthul]] || [[word:chasusujul|chasusujul]] || [[word:chasusushul|chasusushul]] || [[word:chasusukul|chasusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chasusuthuthu|chasusuthuthu]] || [[word:chasusujuju|chasusujuju]] || [[word:chasusushushu|chasusushushu]] || [[word:chasusuku|chasusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chasusuthun|chasusuthun]] || [[word:chasusujun|chasusujun]] || [[word:chasusushun|chasusushun]] || [[word:chasusukun|chasusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chasusuthuoro|chasusuthuoro]] || [[word:chasusujuoro|chasusujuoro]] || [[word:chasusushuoro|chasusushuoro]] || [[word:chasusukuoro|chasusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
